featuredTrials.title: Patient Satisfaction and Quality of Life Among Lower Limb Prosthetic Users in Gaza Governorate During Gaza War
featuredTrials.officialTitle: Patient Satisfaction and Quality of Life Among Lower Limb Prosthetic Users in Gaza Governorate During Gaza War
featuredTrials.keyRelevance: Model for urgent-context prosthetic research; demonstrates how conflict zones drive innovation. Rural America faces similar urgency due to provider scarcity.
